scripts.dev: concurrently -n mongo,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm:mongo" "wait-on tcp:27018 && npm run backend" "wait-on tcp:8080 && npm run frontend"
scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 27018,8080,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
